findings: Board has 6 members with 3 independent directors. Gender diversity at 33% female representation.
recommendations: Appoint an additional independent director with gemstone industry expertise.

findings: FY2023 audit completed with qualified opinion due to revenue recognition issues. FY2024 audit delayed by 3 months.
recommendations: Strengthen finance team capacity; implement IFRS 15 revenue recognition policy; engage Big 4 auditor.

findings: Capital adequacy ratio at 18.5%, well above the 12.5% minimum. All prudential returns submitted on time.
recommendations: Develop ICAAP framework to align with Basel III requirements by 2026.

findings: ZAMTEL missed Quality of Service targets for call drop rate and data speed. Universal Service Fund contributions in arrears.
recommendations: Develop QoS improvement plan; clear USF arrears within 6 months; upgrade network infrastructure.

findings: 3 derailments recorded in 2024. Safety Management System not fully implemented. Track inspection frequency below required standard.
recommendations: Implement SMS per SADC railway safety standards; increase track inspection to monthly; train safety officers.

findings: All LuSE and AIM disclosure requirements met. Annual report published within 4 months of year end.
recommendations: Enhance sustainability reporting to align with GRI Standards.

findings: Mining licences current and in good standing. Environmental management plan updated post-acquisition.
recommendations: Strengthen community development fund reporting; increase local procurement to 35%.

findings: Refinery operating within licence conditions. Environmental emissions within ZEMA permitted levels.
recommendations: Upgrade effluent treatment plant to meet 2026 environmental standards.
